case_title: APRIL SHELDON VS. JEAN A. RAPOPORT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-22-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT.
